## Checklist

- [ ] `python -m mypy .` passes
- [ ] `python -m pytest` passes
- [ ] New or changed behaviour is covered by tests
- [ ] Public API changes are reflected in `docs/`
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` [Unreleased] section updated if applicable
